title: hypericum scabrum
intro: Hypericum scabrum, also known as rough-stemmed St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant species in the St. John's Wort genus. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hypericum scabrum include wound healing, reduction of swelling and pain, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or cream for topical application, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
